description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a broad, low-pitched hip roof covered in blue shingles. The front facade features a central double-door entrance flanked by large rectangular windows, and a paved driveway leads up to the entrance. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, with darker trim around the windows and doors. The structure sits on a neatly maintained green lawn, and the roof extends outward to provide shade over the windows and entryway. The rear and side elevations have fewer and smaller windows, emphasizing privacy and simplicity. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a focus on horizontal proportions.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a blue hip roof, large front windows, and a central entrance set on a green lawn. The design is clean and functional, with a light beige exterior and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large front windows, and driveway leading up to the double doors.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting a large side window and the extended roof overhang, with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simple facade with small windows and a continuous hip roof.
description_view_3: Left side view featuring grouped windows and the driveway extending to the side of the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front windows and smaller side and rear windows
